message.content:
@startuml
title 蓝牙配对-搜索流程

participant "IoTRecorderManager" as IoTRecorderManager
participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
participant "sdk_client" as sdk_client
participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList

participant "DiscoveryState" as DiscoveryState
participant "BondedState" as BondedState
participant "GattConnectedState" as GattConnectedState
participant "WifiConfigState" as WifiConfigState

participant "WiFiManagerMachine" as WiFiManagerMachine
participant "BluetoothPanConfig" as BluetoothPanConfig
participant "WifiPortalControl" as WifiPortalControl
participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig

participant "startDiscoveryDevice" as startDiscoveryDevice
participant "BondDevice" as BondDevice
participant "connectGatt" as connectGatt
participant "syncWifiState" as syncWifiState
participant "setWifiState" as setWifiState
participant "wifiScan" as wifiScan

participant "InitState" as InitState
participant "DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver" as DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
participant "BondBroadcastReceiver" as BondBroadcastReceiver
participant "CmdDiscoveryState" as CmdDiscoveryState
participant "CmdBondState" as CmdBondState
participant "CmdGattState" as CmdGattState
participant "CmdWifiState" as CmdWifiState
participant "CmdWifiState_ON" as CmdWifiState_ON
participant "CmdEnableWifi" as CmdEnableWifi
participant "CmdScanWifiList" as CmdScanWifiList
participant "CmdScanWifiList_RESULT" as CmdScanWifiList_RESULT
participant "CmdScanWifiList_RESULT_AVAILABLE" as CmdScanWifiList_RESULT_AVAILABLE
participant "sendMessage" as sendMessage
participant "processMessage" as processMessage

startDiscoveryDevice -> IoTRecorderManager: startDiscoveryDevice
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_DISCOVERY_START
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl: DiscoveryState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: registerReceiver
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: startDiscovery
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: startDiscovery
BluetoothGatt -> WifiList: 搜索设备
WifiList -> BluetoothGatt: 发现设备

BluetoothGatt -> DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver: BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver -> BlueDiscoveryControl: DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: sendMessage
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothDevice: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: BluetoothDevice

BluetoothGatt -> BondBroadcastReceiver: BondBroadcastReceiver
BondBroadcastReceiver -> BlueDiscoveryControl: BondBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothDevice: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS

connectGatt -> IoTRecorderManager: connectGatt
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_CONNECT_GATT
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl: BleScanState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: startLeScan
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: ScanCallback.onScanResult
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
IoTRecorderManager -> BluetoothDevice: connect
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: connectGatt
BluetoothGatt -> WifiList: discoverServices
WifiList -> BluetoothGatt: onServicesDiscovered
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: setCharacteristicNotification
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: 拿到需要的服务和特征
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothDevice: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
BluetoothGatt -> GattConnectedState: GattConnectedState.enter
GattConnectedState -> IoTRecorderManager: GattConnectedState
GattConnectedState -> WiFiManagerMachine: new
WiFiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig: new
BluetoothPanConfig -> WifiPortalControl: new
WifiPortalControl -> WiFiManagerMachine: CMD_START
WiFiManagerMachine -> GattConnectedState: CmdConnectedState
GattConnectedState -> IoTRecorderManager: CmdConnectedState
GattConnectedState -> WiFiManagerMachine: new
WiFiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig: new
BluetoothPanConfig -> WifiPortalControl: new
WifiPortalControl -> WiFiManagerMachine: CMD_START
WifiManagerMachine -> GattConnectedState: IdtState -> WifiConfigState
WifiConfigState -> IoTRecorderManager: CMD_START
WifiConfigState -> BluetoothAdapter: CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
BluetoothAdapter -> BlueDiscoveryControl: CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: onCharacteristicChanged
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: setWifiState("ON")
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: setCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: setCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: processMessage
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE, message.arg1 = WiFiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE_ON, message.arg2 = new String("true")
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothAdapter: processMessage
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: processMessage
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: processMessage
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: processMessage
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: message.what = IoTRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON, message.arg1 = IoTRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON, message.obj = mClientHandler.sendMessage(message)

setWifiState -> IoTRecorderManager: setWifiState
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl: CmdEnableWifi
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: setCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: setCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: onCharacteristicChanged
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: onCharacteristicChanged
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: onCharacteristicChanged
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: onCharacteristicChanged
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: onCharacteristicChanged
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: setWifiState("ON")
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: setCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: setCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: processMessage
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: processMessage
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothAdapter: processMessage
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: processMessage
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: processMessage
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: processMessage
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: processMessage

wifiScan -> IoTRecorderManager: wifiScan
IoTRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl: CmdScanWifiList
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter: setCharacteristic
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothDevice: setCharacteristic
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BlueDiscoveryControl: writeCharacteristic
BlueDiscoveryControl -> IoTRecorderManager: writeCharacteristic
